channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping by National grid Building, 22nd April
item.description:
///chains.rated.hype Fly tipping/graffitti/trailing BT wires within the fenced area of a national grid block. Problems are getting worse.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Saint Georges Road, Alstone, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged wall, 22nd April
item.description:
///hands.saving.exists fluid.finely.appear The brick wall along Honeybourne walkway is off-plumb and cracked in places. It is the walkway close to Christchurch school.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Malvern Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Vandalised fencing on Honeybourne Path, 22nd April
item.description:
///firmly.lion.chair Vandalised fencing pulled from concrete posts. Makes easy access to steep embankment leading to Honeybourne Line. Located at the mouth of the path at st George’s Road (near the bridge).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Saint Georges Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Pavement slabs broken and sinking. Also barriers been there for iver 9 months, 22nd April
item.description:
30 Albert place right outside on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Albert Place, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 22nd April
item.description:
Please find attached correspondence for your attention and site investigation report(s) for your viewing.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 22nd April
item.description:
Replace chevron plus 1 post ASAP Stats required Traffic Lights TM ///lighters.hiked.ribs (Damaged Traffic Sign)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Road Markings problem, 22nd April
item.description:
Faded road markings Junctions on to roundabout are OK, actual roundabout is faded and needs repaint X 1 circle approx 3m diameter Road closure (Faded Road Markings)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 22nd April
item.description:
pothole
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 22nd April
item.description:
Give and take 28 days plus temporary footway closure footway aburt level difference 600x400x20mm tarmac parch stats required (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 22nd April
item.description:
Road closure 28 day carriage way pothole approx 500x500x40mm number 1 (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 22nd April
item.description:
Road closure 28 day carriage way pothole approx 600x500x40mm number 4 stats required plus x4 NSD (CW6 Pothole)

item.description:

item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 22nd April
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure please lift and replace x1 raised broken 400x400x15mm yellow tactile slab (FW Broken Slabs)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
